descriptionInUI: MOOSE CSAR runtime for the Combat SAR flight task. When a pilot ejects, a downed-pilot is spawned with a radio beacon and the CH-47 flights tasked Combat SAR can fly in, hover/land, and recover them; C-130 flights tasked Combat SAR fly the HC-130 'King' overhead orbit. Inert unless at least one blue Combat SAR flight is in the mission (the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.CombatSAR only then). Blue-side. By default only HUMAN ejections count and rescue is player-flown; turning on the 'Automatic Combat SAR' campaign setting also lets AI rescue helos be commandeered for a standing alert (and makes AI ejections rescuable).

specificOptions.nameInUI: Auto-smoke the downed pilot when a rescue helo is near
Pickup distance for boarding the downed pilot (m)
Rescue-hover height the helo must hold to pick up (m)
